sections.sectionTitle: Topa in Sa Piak ding Ciam

verses.text: Mihonte in amau' tuahsiatna hangin Topa' zakin a phun uh hi. Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin heh mahmah a, amaute' lakah Topa' mei kuangin, giahphual nawl kimkhat kangtum hi
Tua ciangin Moses' zak dingin mite kiko uh hi. Moses in Topa' tungah thu ngen a, mei a mit hi
Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' lakah Topa' mei a kuang hi
Tu-in amaute' lakah a om gamdang mite in anlim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi. Israel mite zong kap kik uh a, “Sa nek ding nei hi leeng maw
Egypt-ah man pialoin i nek ngasate, tangmaite, dawnpawlte, lo-uih neute, lo-uih sante, leh lo-uih kangte i phawkphawk hi
Ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a, hih manna simloh bangmah dang om peuhmahlo hi,” a ci uh hi
Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a, a meel pen bedolak singnai tawh kibang hi
Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a, an gawina tawh gawi-in, tua ahih kei leh sum sungah su-in, beelin huan uh a, mohin a bawl uh hi. A limna pen sathau tawh a kibawl moh ki-em tawh kibang hi
Zanin giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi
Mite a innkuankuanun a milipin a puanbuk kongah a kahna uh Moses in a za hi. Topa nak hehlua mahmah ahih manin Moses lungkimlo hi
Moses in Topa' kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasempa hong hici bawlsiat na hi hiam? Bang hangin na maipha hong musak loin, hih mi khempeuhte' tavuan kei' tungah hong suan na hi hiam

Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in kei' kiangah, ‘Nau cingnu in nawine naungek a puak bangin, nangmah in amau' pate piak dingin ka ciam leitangah amaute ang puakin paipih in,’ nong cih theihna dingin kei' sunga piang ahi uh hiam
Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi-ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai-ah amaute kapin, ‘Ka nek ding uh sa hong pia in,’ hong ci uh hi
Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka sizo kei a, kei-a' dingin tavuan lianlua hi
Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh, ka gentheihna ka kimuh lohna dingin nong hehpih zawh leh, thakhatin hong thatzaw in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite' upa leh ulian hi ci-in na theih, Israel upate' sung panin mi sawmsagih hong khopsakin, kikhopna bukah amaute paipih in la, tua lai-ah nang tawh dingkhawm sak in

Keimah hong paisukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho ding a, keimah in nang' sunga om kha pawlkhat la-in amaute' sungah ka guang ding hi. Nang guak in na puaklohna dingin amaute in mite' tavuan hong puakpih ding uh hi

Mite tungah, ‘Zing cianga dingin note ki-ap pha un, sa na ne ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' zakin na kap uh a, “Sa nek ding kua in hong pia ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gamah nuam i sa hi,” na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note' tungah Topa in sa hong pia ding a, note in sa na ne ding uh hi
Note in ni khat sung, ahih kei leh ni nih sung, ahih kei leh ni nga sung, ahih kei leh ni sawm sung, ahih kei leh ni sawmnih sung bek neloin

na ikkhiat dong uh leh na kih dong matengun kha khat sung tawntung sa na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' lakah a om Topa nialin a mai-ah na kap uh a, “Bang hangin Egypt panin paikhia ihi hiam?” na ci uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in, “Kei tawh a kisim khawm mi tul zaguk tak om hi. Nangmah in, ‘Kha khat sung tawntung a nek dingun amaute sa pia ning!’ na ci hi
Amaute' khamzah dingin tuuhonte leh bawnghonte amau-a' dingin kigozo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amau' khamzah ding kimanzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “ Topa' hih theih ding zah kiciangtan sa na hi hiam? Ka thugen a manin hong tun' leh hong tun'loh tu-in na mu ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Moses paikhia-in mite' tungah Topa' thugente a gensawn hi. Amah in mite a makai mi sawmsagih kaikhawmin, Puanbuk kimkotah amaute omsak hi

Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong paisukin amah hopih a, ama sunga om kha pawlkhat la-in upa sawmsagihte' sungah a guang hi. Amaute' sungah tua kha a om ciangin, amaute in kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in tua khit zawh hih nawnlo uh hi

Giahphualah mi nih om uh a, khat Eldad kici-in, a khat Medad kici a, amaute' sungah tua kha a lut hi. Amaute pen a kiciamtehte lakah a kihelte hi uh a, ahih hangin Puanbukah pailoin, giahphualah kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi
Tangval khat va tai-in Moses kiangah, “Eldad leh Medad-te in giahphualah thu a gen uh hi,” va ci hi
Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi, Moses' nasem, Nun' tapa Joshua in, “Ka topa Moses aw, amaute kham in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah, “Keima tangin hong hazatsak na hi hiam? Topa' mi khempeuh kamsang hi hen la, Topa in amau' sungah ama Kha guan' leh ka cih laitak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses leh Israel upate giahphualah a ciahkik uh hi.

Topa' kiang panin huih nungin, tuipi panin vamimte hong puak a, giahphual kiang hih lampang ni khat paina ciang, hua lampang ni khat paina ciang mah giahphual kimkotah kiasak a, lei maitang tungah pi thum bang a sah hi

Tua sun tawntung leh a zan tawntung leh a zing ciang tawntung mite dingin vamimte a khawm uh hi. Tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm a, amaute in amau-a' dingin giahphual kimkotah tuate a pho uh hi
Sa a kigaih ma, amau' ha kawmah sa a baang laipi mahin, mite' tungah Topa hong heh mahmah a, Topa in gimna lianpi khat tawh mite a vatgawp hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibrothhattaavah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sa a lunggulh mite tua lai munah a vui uh hi
Kibrothhattaavah panin Hazeroth munah mite pai uh a, Hazeroth-ah amaute a taam uh hi.
